goal: Draft a public thank-you LinkedIn post that is tasteful and avoids burning bridges.
constraints: When drafting emails, include a subject line and exactly three short paragraphs

open: New job start date: propose start options (June 15, 2026 onsite; June 1 remote onboarding with official start June 15); June 13, 2026 to meet 21-day notice

LinkedIn post draft options for public thank-you note to old team

Identify and fluently learn a prioritized set of product metrics for consumer e-commerce (acquisition, activation, conversion, revenue, retention, efficiency, quality) with definitions, calculation, segmentation, and caveats.

PM mindset learning resources plan: quick books and podcasts with a week-by-week plan (read one short book in week 1; 2-3 podcast episodes per week; implement lessons) and options to curate 3-episode starter packs or a one-week reading/listening schedule.
